source_pr.title: test:make TestLoadDataMissingColumn stable
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #15879 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: 
CI sometimes fail because little delta between current time and written time.
When using current timestamp as written value. There is possiblity that your check time is 1 second later than written time. 
```
[2020-04-07T11:32:56.533Z] FAIL: write_test.go:1935: testSuite8.TestLoadDataMissingColumn

[2020-04-07T11:32:56.533Z] 

[2020-04-07T11:32:56.534Z] write_test.go:1960:

[2020-04-07T11:32:56.534Z]     checkCases(tests, ld, c, tk, ctx, selectSQL, deleteSQL)

[2020-04-07T11:32:56.534Z] /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/util/testkit/testkit.go:62:

[2020-04-07T11:32:56.534Z]     res.c.Assert(resBuff.String(), check.Equals, needBuff.String(), res.comment)

[2020-04-07T11:32:56.534Z] ... obtained string = "[12 2020-04-07 19:32:56]\n"

[2020-04-07T11:32:56.534Z] ... expected string = "[12 2020-04-07 19:32:55]\n"

[2020-04-07T11:32:56.534Z] ... sql:select * from load_data_missing;, args:[]
```

### What is changed and how it works?
just check hour and minute value, not check second value


### Related changes

- None
### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- None

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

evidence: evidence: PR title: make TestLoadDataMissingColumn stable.
evidence: avoids comparing full current timestamp string; only checks hour/minute fields to reduce timing flakiness (executor/write_test.go).
